channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran War 'Re-escalation Risks' Keep Oil Prices Volatile as Talks Stall
item.description: Oil prices remain volatile due to risks of renewed conflict with Iran, as Tehran says it has shared another set of revised peace terms with the U.S.

item.title: Cassidy loses; Trump-backed Letlow and Fleming head to runoff, AP projects
item.description: Incumbent Senator Bill Cassidy faced Trump-backed Representative Julia Letlow and State Treasurer John Fleming.

item.title: Gunman kills 6, injures 8 in latest shooting spree in Turkey
item.description: A rifle-wielding man launched a series of attacks, killing at least six and wounding eight others, according to Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

item.title: American doctor in Congo tests positive for Ebola
item.description: A U.S. medical missionary in the Democratic Republic of Congo has a confirmed Ebola case and is being transported to Germany for care.
